name: OData $metadata document reachable without authentication
description: Probes /$metadata on the target. OData's CSDL metadata document describes every entity set, navigation property, and function — a complete schema-disclosure vector. Equivalent to GraphQL introspection or gRPC reflection: in production it lets unauthenticated callers map the entire service catalogue without ever invoking a real endpoint. Many ASP.NET / Apache Olingo / SAP / Microsoft OData deployments ship $metadata open by default for client tooling discovery.

vulnerability.remediation: Gate /$metadata behind the same authentication policy that protects the data endpoints. ASP.NET Core OData: `services.AddControllers().AddOData(opt => opt.AddRouteComponents("odata", builder.GetEdmModel()))` followed by `app.MapControllers().RequireAuthorization()` — the OData routing inherits the policy. SAP Gateway: configure the metadata cache + auth check via /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE. For public APIs where schema disclosure is acceptable, document the choice explicitly and accept the finding (use `--exclude bwr-odata-001`).
